race.comment: COOL MUSIC (9) is an honest commodity who saves her best form for this distance range. Boasts a win over this track and trip and can continue the rich vein of form with Melbourne Cup winning jockey Dolan on board. CAISHEN (10) will strip fitter second-up from the break and gun rider Wiggins stays on top. Sure to prove tough to hold out. Former Victorian BLACK EYED BLONDE (12) got the job done at Toowoomba when having the first run for the new stable and will have come on with that victory now in the locker. Right in this contest. OUT OF TURN (1) best of the rest in an open race to close out the card.
